title: Crispy Wontons with Savory Crumble
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring crispy wontons topped with a savory crumble for a satisfying crunch. This recipe makes a perfect snack or side dish.
instructions: 1. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a small bowl, mix together the beaten egg and soy sauce.
3. Dip each wonton wrapper into the egg mixture and coat evenly.
4. Carefully place the coated wonton wrapper into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
5. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried wonton and place it on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. In a separate pan, heat the crushed chips over medium heat.
7. Add the shredded cabbage and cook until wilted.
8. To assemble, place a few fried wontons on a serving plate and top with the chip and cabbage mixture.
9. Sprinkle the savory crumble over the top.
